nodes.name: Append or update row in sheet

assignments.name: prompt
assignments.value: ={{ 'You are a hiring evaluator. Role: ' + $json.role + '. ' + ($json.role === 'SWE' ? 'Evaluate: coding skills, technical stack, projects.' : 'Evaluate: sales experience, communication, business acumen.') + ' Resume: ' + $json.text.replace(/\n/g, ' ').replace(/"/g, "\'") + ' Return JSON with: score (0-100), classification (strong/average/weak), summary, strengths, concerns, interview_recommendation (yes/no)' }}

parameters.subject: =Interview Invitation – {{ $json.Role }} at Trilles AI
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.Name }},

We are pleased to inform you that after reviewing your application for the {{ $json.Role }} position at Trilles AI, we would like to invite you for an interview.

Our team was impressed with your profile and looks forward to speaking with you.

You will receive a calendar invitation shortly with the meeting details.

Best regards,
Trilles AI Hiring Team

parameters.subject: =Manual Review Needed: {{ $json.Name }} – {{ $json.Role }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi Hiring Manager,

The following candidate requires your manual review:

Name:{{ $json.Name }}
Role:{{ $json.Role }}
Score:{{ $json.Score }}
Summary:{{ $json.Summary }}

Please review and take appropriate action.

Trilles AI Hiring System

parameters.subject: =Your Application to Trilles AI – {{ $json.Role }}
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $json.Name }},

Thank you for taking the time to apply for the {{ $json.Role }} position at Trilles AI.

After carefully reviewing your application, we have decided to move forward with other candidates whose experience more closely matches our current needs.

We truly appreciate your interest in Trilles AI and encourage you to apply again in the future as new opportunities arise.

We wish you the very best in your career journey.

Warm regards,
Trilles AI Hiring Team

main.node: Append or update row in sheet
